profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Kentanix Supra International Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate business in Indonesia. It develops and sells residential houses, and engages in the waterpark business. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT Kentanix Supra International Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Badra Arta.
